name: Diving World Map
aboutText: Diving World Map collects dive sites across the world's seas, lakes and quarries — reefs and wrecks, walls and drift dives, training spots and bucket-list descents — into one browsable map.

Sites are drawn from OpenStreetMap's `sport=scuba_diving` tag and added by divers. Conditions, depth, currents and the need for a guide vary enormously, so always dive within your training and check with a local operator first.
